stemHtml:
A Lambert Conformal conic projection has standard parallels at 37°N and 65°N. The published scale is given as 1 inch = 25 NM.
With respect to the scale variation for this chart, it can be stated that...

options.a: For the areas north of 65°N and south of 37°N, the scale is as stated on the chart.
options.b: The scale within the standard parallels differs by less than 1% from the scale stated on the chart.
options.c: For the areas north of 65°N and south of 37°N, 1 inch represents more than 25 NM.
options.d: From the standard parallels towards the parallel of origin, the scale increases; from the standard parallels to the North and the South, the scale decreases.
